{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/92903761?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/odgrso", "id": 92903761, "login": "odgrso", "node_id": "U_kgDOBYmZUQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-65595", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:H/SI:L/SA:L"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-269", "name": "Improper Privilege Management"}], "description": "## Impact

JWTs issued through the Token Exchange module were assigned all Public API key scopes, regardless of the acting user's actual role. A low-privileged user who could obtain a valid external JWT trusted by a configured issuer could therefore use the resulting access token to invoke administrator-only Public API operations, such as role escalation, user creation, and user deletion.

The issue only affects instances where the Token Exchange feature and the Public API are enabled (N8N_TOKEN_EXCHANGE_ENABLED=true, N8N_ENV_FEAT_TOKEN_EXCHANGE=true) and the attacker can obtain an external JWT accepted by a configured trusted key. Role escalation additionally requires an Advanced Permissions license; Community Package installation additionally requires `N8N_COMMUNITY_PACKAGES_ENABLED=true` and `N8N_UNVERIFIED_PACKAGES_ENABLED=true`.

## Patches

The issue has been fixed in n8n version 2.30.1 and 2.29.8. Users should upgrade to this version or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds

If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Disable the Token Exchange feature by setting `N8N_TOKEN_EXCHANGE_ENABLED=false` or `N8N_ENV_FEAT_TOKEN_EXCHANGE=false`.
- If Token Exchange cannot be disabled, restrict Public API access at the network level to trusted clients only.
- Disable unverified Community Package installation by setting `N8N_UNVERIFIED_PACKAGES_ENABLED=false` to eliminate the code execution path.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-777w-rpr6-c52h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T22:00:07Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-777w-rpr6-c52h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-777w-rpr6-c52h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-65595"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-22T22:00:07Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-777w-rpr6-c52h", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-65595", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@2.29.8", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@2.30.1", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/n8n-before-privilege-escalation-via-token-exchange", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-777w-rpr6-c52h"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-777w-rpr6-c52h", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n: Privilege Escalation and Code Execution via Full Public API Key Scope Assignment to Token Exchange JWTs", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T22:00:08Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-777w-rpr6-c52h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.30.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.30.0, < 2.30.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.29.8", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.29.8"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n: Privilege Escalation and Code Execution via Full Public API Key Scope Assignment to Token Exchange JWTs
